message:
chore(beads): remove orphaned beads.left.jsonl merge artifact

Remove the beads.left.jsonl file (770 lines) which was a leftover merge
artifact from a prior beads database reconciliation. The canonical issue
state is maintained in issues.jsonl and the beads.db SQLite database;
this file was no longer referenced by the tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
